retry_reason: kref_get always succeeds unconditionally, so retry is never needed.
contract_summary: This is a kref get wrapper that unconditionally increments the reference count on an autogroup struct. It returns the same pointer with an additional reference. The caller must later call a corresponding put (e.g., autogroup_kref_put) to release the reference. There is no failure path; the operation always succeeds.
